---
title: "Lab 2b: Digitizing Field Data (QGIS)"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · QGIS track · Day 2"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab02b_Digitizing_QGIS_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab02b_Digitizing_QGIS_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Online version](lab2b-online.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab02b_Digitizing_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab02b_Digitizing_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab2b-qgis.md >}}
